coverage: 100% of all reachable node types across 14 groups and 302 nodes.
parameter_sweep: All seven authored, 3x3, depth 40, horizontal-divider, two-vertical-divider, raised-divider, and optional grid-line cases match Blender topology exactly. Grid-lines mode is 13,328 / 12,449 on both sides, with bounds within 0.0004 units.
validation: Modifier named-attribute bindings preserve the source profile's top-edge and inner-wall selections; closed planar Curve to Mesh frames and the evaluated hollow-foot dependency reproduce Blender's complete bin shell and placement. Crossing cyclic outlines are split into a planar arrangement before triangle filling, and the final collinear boundary point is retained by splitting its neighboring triangle, closing the last six-vertex/six-face grid-line gap.
